inputs.label: Square Inches
inputs.businessContext: The area in square inches to convert.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: The conversion factor. Default 6.4516 (ISO standard). Change for custom conversions.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the output.

inputs.label: Apply Rounding
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 to round the output, 0 to display raw result.

formulas.roundedSqcm: applyRounding === 1 ? Math.round(rawSqcm * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces) : rawSqcm
formulas.breakdownFormula2: applyRounding === 1 ? `Rounded to ${decimalPlaces} decimal places: ${roundedSqcm} cm²` : `No rounding applied: ${rawSqcm} cm²`
